notes: No crashes, no autosave bug, no graphical artifacts. Runs great out of the box. Changing to fullscreen windowed mode caused the screen to be permanently black but sounds still played. If this happens to you, delete your config.bin found here to get the game back to normal: ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/323190/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/Application Data/11bitstudios/Frostpunk

notes: Frostpunk works reliably after installing vcrun2013.  You can do this from winetricks (WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steamapps/compatdata/323190/pfx winetricks).  This will solve the problem with Steam treating Frostpunk as though it was running for the first time every time, and it will also solve the problem with the game crashing to desktop when starting or loading a session from the main menu.
